Hero.description: Chivox MCP outputs high-granularity speech assessment metadata via a standard protocol, enabling LLMs to understand, analyze, and generate personalized oral teaching feedback.

Features.title: Rich Data Dimensions
Features.description: Four primary scores (accuracy, integrity, fluency, rhythm) plus phoneme-level diagnostics and error typing — exam-grade granularity piped straight to LLMs.
Features.all_params_desc: The MCP interface mirrors Chivox's exam-grade engine API: four main scores, phoneme-level alignment, and error classification — all LLM-ready.
Features.overall_desc: Weighted composite of pronunciation, integrity, fluency and rhythm
Features.accuracy_desc: Pronunciation accuracy down to the phoneme level
Features.integrity_desc: Detects insertion, omission and skipping — did they actually finish?
Features.fluency_desc: Naturalness of flow and pause placement
Features.rhythm_desc: Stress, prosodic phrasing and intonation combined
Features.speed_desc: Live WPM / SPM — penalised for both too fast and too slow
Features.diagnostics_desc: Per-word / per-phoneme tagging: normal / omit / insert / mispron
Features.phoneme_desc: Score, timestamp and confidence for every phoneme

Value.label: Workflow
Value.title: Deep Secondary Analysis
Value.description: Developers can guide LLMs to consume these parameters, combining specific educational prompts for semantic-level deep diagnosis of users' oral performance.
Value.step_section_title: From Assessment Data to Teaching Feedback
Value.step_section_desc: Just 4 steps to transform speech assessment data into LLM-driven personalized teaching content.
Value.demo_desc: MCP outputs assessment results as structured JSON. LLMs can directly consume this data for semantic-level analysis and generate targeted teaching feedback.
Value.demo_point1: Seamless integration with GPT-4, Claude 3, and other leading LLMs
Value.demo_point2: LLMs can pinpoint specific phoneme weaknesses with corrective guidance
Value.demo_point3: Intelligently generate tongue twisters, shadowing materials, and personalized improvement plans
Value.demo_llm_response: Your fluency is excellent (85)! But accuracy (65) has room for improvement. You're confusing /θ/ and /r/ phonemes. Try practicing: 'Thirty-three thieves thought they thrilled the throne throughout Thursday.' Also note the stress difference in 'record' and 'present' between noun and verb forms.
Value.step1_desc: User reads the designated text, audio is processed in real time by MCP
Value.step2_desc: Returns 20+ dimensional parameters including accuracy, fluency, and stress
Value.step3_desc: LLM consumes assessment data and generates a diagnostic report with prompts
Value.step4_desc: Outputs practice suggestions, correction plans, personalized learning paths

Advanced.title: Power Any AI Product
Advanced.description: Based on the MCP standard protocol, any AI client (Cursor, Coze, Doubao, Feishu/DingTalk bots and more) gains speech assessment in a single config. From classrooms to corporate training, from podcast QC to IM assistants — product teams ship the loop without reinventing the wheel.
Advanced.card1_desc: No SDK wrapping — configure and ship
Advanced.card2_desc: Works with every MCP-compatible client and agent
Advanced.card3_desc: Ready for education, enterprise, content and hardware

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.description: Tiered by usage — from free trial to enterprise custom — flexibly adapting to every stage.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.a1: MCP stands for Model Context Protocol — a standardized protocol that exposes external tools and data sources to large language models in a unified format. Chivox MCP uses this protocol to provide structured speech assessment data for LLM consumption.
FAQ.a2: Users send audio through a client. The Chivox MCP server completes the speech assessment and returns structured data with multi-dimensional parameters like overall score, accuracy, and fluency. This data can be directly understood by LLMs to generate teaching feedback.
FAQ.a3: Currently we support Chinese (Mandarin) and English speech assessment. More languages are being added — please contact us for specific language needs.
FAQ.q4: How do I install and integrate the MCP service?
FAQ.a4: Install our MCP Server package via npm, configure your API Key, and you're ready to use it in MCP-compatible clients like Claude and Cursor. See our developer documentation for details.
FAQ.q5: How is MCP different from a regular speech assessment API?
FAQ.a5: Traditional APIs only return scores that developers must interpret and present. MCP outputs assessment data in an LLM-readable format, allowing models to directly perform secondary analysis and generate teaching content — significantly reducing development costs.
FAQ.a6: MCP services use HTTPS encrypted transmission. Audio data is destroyed immediately after assessment — no retention. Enterprise users can opt for private deployment.
FAQ.a7: Yes. MCP provides streaming assessment capabilities, returning intermediate results while the user is reading, suitable for interactive oral practice scenarios.

About.title: About Chivox
About.description: Suzhou Chivox Information Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in intelligent speech assessment technology, with years of deep experience in educational technology. We are committed to delivering advanced speech recognition and assessment capabilities through standardized protocols, lowering the technical barrier for education products so that every developer can easily build professional voice-based teaching applications.
